stem: v = 25 + 4t. The equation gives the speed v, in miles per hour, of a car t seconds after it began to accelerate. What is the speed, in miles per hour, of the car 8 seconds after it began to accelerate?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. Substituting t = 8: v = 25 + 4(8) = 25 + 32 = 57.

Choice A is the initial value at t = 0. Choice B is only 4(8). Choice C results from multiplying 25 by 4 instead of using the linear formula.
